crime.value: Violent assault with torture elements - victim experiences physical pain and screaming
crime.quote: something warm and wet. A coppery smell filled her nostrils as a searing pain snaked its way up her neck

victim.value: Female victim targeted for unknown reasons, experiences deliberate torture
victim.quote: To his delight, the screams began.

culprit_and_motive.value: Male perpetrator who derives pleasure from victim's suffering
culprit_and_motive.quote: To his delight, the screams began.

investigator.value: Detective Lou Donovan - homicide detective with institutional authority
investigator.quote: Detective Lou Donovan stood four feet from the flat screen television staring, highly annoyed.

social_world.value: Modern social hierarchy based on fiscal power rather than natural order, where position determines access and behavior
social_world.quote: Whether your name is on the V.I.P. list or you are required to wait in line behind the velvet rope with everyone else

investigator_wound.value: Detective Lou Donovan's identity struggle between family expectations and professional demands as fifth-generation cop
investigator_wound.quote: It was well known among the ranks that this fifth generation cop was all bus

_meta.title: ebook mell corcoran shadows of doubt
